use_cases: Team member profile cards that reveal contact info on hover
Speaker or presenter bio cards for conference websites
Employee directory with space-efficient hover-reveal design
Portfolio cards showcasing individuals with expandable details
Contact cards for professional networking pages
ai_summary: A contact card component featuring a full-bleed profile image with an overlay that smoothly reveals on hover, displaying contact information with slide-up animations. Supports multiple color variants (default, primary, secondary) and size options. The interaction uses scale, opacity, and translateY transitions for an elegant user experience. Ideal for team pages, directories, or speaker sections where space efficiency and visual appeal are priorities.
